title: International Transfers
body_text:
International Transfers
1	Introduction to International Transfers
1.1	Overview of International Transfers
International Transfers allows customers to transfer funds internationally through online banking and mobile app via a partnership with Agility Forex. International Transfers is available for both retail and small business customers in digital banking.
Note:			Your financial institution must use CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments system to participate in International Transfers.
When creating an international transfer, first-time users must accept the terms and conditions to proceed to the Agility Forex website to set up their profile.
Retail Customers
ГўВҖВ“ Create a personal profile, upload a copy of a government-issued ID (e.g., driverГўВҖВҷs licence or passport) to confirm their personal details.
Small Business Administrators
ГўВҖВ“ Create a business profile, upload a copy of government-issued ID for administrator and large shareholders, and proof of entity such as articles of certificate or incorporation. Administrators can add secondary users who have access to the businessГўВҖВҷs online banking.
Customers enter transfer details (e.g., recipient, transaction amount, currency, reason for transfers), request a live financial exchange (FX) quote and complete the transaction. The customerГўВҖВҷs account is debited immediately.
Note:	Settlement with the recipientГўВҖВҷs financial institution typically occurs within 1ГўВҖВ“3 business days, but this may differ by country based on local delivery times.
International transfers are processed, settled, and reported between Central 1 and your financial institution as electronic bill payments. To move funds internationally, Agility Forex transfers funds from its account with a Canadian financial institution to its account with an international financial institution. The transfer amount is then credited to the recipientГўВҖВҷs account.
International Transfers is secured by:
AES 256-bit encryption
ГўВҖВ“ A data/file encryption standard used to encrypt and decrypt the transfer.
Integrated automated identify verification
ГўВҖВ“ A system that verifies government documents that customers upload to the Agility Forex platform.
Agility Forex is responsible for conducting AML surveillance and reporting for International Transfers.
For more information about International Transfers see the
International Transfers product page on the Client Centre.
Related Payment Solutions Manual Parts
Electronic Bill Payments System Part
Online Tracing System Part
1.2	International Transfer Limit
International Transfers uses CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments system. The default bill payment limits for International Transfers are as follows:
International Transfers ГўВҖВ“ Retail has a default bill payment limit of $25,000 per transaction. Financial institutions using real-time bill payments can elect to increase the limit specifically for International Transfers. To increase your International Transfers retail limit, complete the
International Transfers Implementation Requirements Form ГўВҖВ“ Retail
on the Client Centre and forward as directed on the form.
International Transfers ГўВҖВ“ Small Business has a default bill payment limit of $50,000 per transaction. Individual businesses can request a limit increase following an enhanced due diligence process. Contact Client Support Services for more information. See Section 1.3 Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
